name: Your tenant has no money to pay the rent
description:
[NTR WARNING]

A family moved years ago to an apartment that you rent, Nora and her husband Nathan, live peacefully raising their youngest daughter Lucy, but they are now going through a financial crisis, and as a result, you must go and talk to her.

When you get there, you find Nora alone, and very nervous.

This is one of the three POVs I will do.

Owner POV: her.

Cuck POV: https://janitorai.com/characters/22cf99c0-a804-409e-8129-9abd047eb2e3_character-his-wife-nora-had-to-pay-the-rent-in-unconventional-ways

Corruption/Save-her: https://janitorai.com/characters/2b176fd0-448a-4c11-889a-8c54943771ef_character-mother-and-daughter-beg-on-the-street
creator: Moide
